channel.title: Glenn Hurley
channel.description: A running log of short thoughts from Glenn Hurley.

item.title: Built a Hangman game.
item.description: Built a Hangman game. Paper and sketch style, 283 kid-friendly words, 9 chances. Go play at glennhurley.com/hangman.

item.title: Added a leaderboard to tic-tac-toe.
item.description: Added a leaderboard to tic-tac-toe. Enter your name, play 10 rounds, scores get submitted automatically. Also gave it a retro arcade font because obviously.

item.title: Been heads-down on a new project.
item.description: Been heads-down on a new project. Neglected this place in the meantime — sorry, log. More updates soon.

item.title: Time to work on some marketing materials.
item.description: Time to work on some marketing materials.

item.title: Got the gallery and tic-tac-toe created tonight while having to drop pong because of mobile.
item.description: Got the gallery and tic-tac-toe created tonight while having to drop pong because of mobile.

item.title: My daughter is now showing at glennhurley.com/gallery.
item.description: My daughter is now showing at glennhurley.com/gallery. She prefers to remain anonymous, so she goes by Artist A. The debut piece is called “The Masterpiece.” I have no notes.

item.title: Talked to my terminal and an AI agent wrote this post for me.
item.description: Talked to my terminal and an AI agent wrote this post for me. It formatted it, added the timestamp, and committed it to GitHub. All I did was talk. Not sure if that’s impressive or lazy. Probably both.

item.title: Starting a log.
item.description: Starting a log. Somewhere between a blog and a Twitter feed — short thoughts, no titles, just a running stream.
